assessmentQuestionVersion.name: Medical Record Documentation: H&P, Progress Notes, Transfer, and Discharge
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText: Documents in the medical record a complete history and physical examination for acute and complex chronically ill patients upon initial admission/consultation and key components of patient's progress via daily progress note, transfer, and discharge summary

AssessmentQuestion.name: Medical Record Documentation: H&P, Progress Notes, Transfer, and Discharge
